name: Facial Recognition (Law Enforcement)
description: Urban law-enforcement watchlist matching deployment with elevated fairness and privacy risk exposure.

source_reference.citation: Scenario synthesized for MEDF evaluation from public governance discussions on facial recognition policy and ethics.

assumptions: Scores are analyst-assigned Likert estimates for a deployment-like scenario and are not direct measurements from a live police system.
The cited source is used for governance context; it is not evidence of one specific municipality implementation.
Risk framing prioritizes fairness and privacy concerns commonly discussed in public-sector facial recognition governance.
